personal_subtitle: I build products end-to-end: robust APIs, serverless architectures on AWS, and modern interfaces with React and Next.js.
about_bio_1: Fullstack Developer with experience in logistics, HR, real estate, e-commerce, and mobility projects. I've worked with Node.js, NestJS, and AWS to design scalable, high-impact systems.
about_bio_2: I'm passionate about end-to-end delivery: from architecture design to production deployment, with a focus on quality, automation, and CI/CD best practices.
skill_highlight_aws_description: Certified Cloud Practitioner. Experience with Lambda, API Gateway, S3, RDS, SQS, EventBridge, and Cognito.
skill_highlight_fullstack_description: I deliver complete products: from serverless APIs and microservice architectures to modern interfaces with React and Next.js.
skill_highlight_ai_description: Implemented features with OpenAI API and LangChain for sentiment analysis, clustering, and survey automation.
case_study_confidential: Some details are omitted for confidentiality.
project_tms_challenge: The client needed to migrate their Transport Management System (TMS) to a modern architecture without losing existing functionality. The legacy system had route query times of up to 3 minutes, impacting daily logistics operations.
project_tms_role: Backend Developer — I led the migration to a serverless architecture with AWS Lambda. I chose serverless over containers to optimize costs: functions only run on demand, eliminating always-on servers. I designed the system in a modular way for easier maintenance and scalability.
project_tms_results: Route query times reduced from ~3 minutes to seconds. Operational costs optimized by eliminating always-on infrastructure. Modular system that allows adding features without affecting existing ones.
project_proximity_challenge: The client needed to control vehicle entries and exits across 6 industrial parks. The main challenge was standardizing two different camera vendors (including Hikvision) to achieve unified traceability across all parks.
project_proximity_role: Backend Developer — I designed and built a multitenant access control system, integrating webhooks from two camera providers into a standardized pipeline for real-time vehicle and package monitoring.
project_proximity_results: Unified monitoring across 6 industrial parks with real-time traceability, regardless of camera vendor. Multitenant system that scales to new parks without duplicating infrastructure.
project_rrhh_challenge: The company had tried tools like Trello and Airtable, but none fit their actual workflow. HR processes for 90 employees were managed manually with spreadsheets.
project_rrhh_role: Backend Developer — I designed the database and selected the tech stack. Built a custom system: task management with workload balancing, vacation tracking, time logging, incidents that convert to tasks, company-wide announcements, and Gross Margin reports for executives.
project_rrhh_results: Replaced manual Excel processes and scattered tools with a unified system for 90 employees. PMs now have full visibility over team workload and project costs.
projects_empty: No projects match the selected filters.
project_tms_description: Migration of a critical TMS to a new serverless architecture on AWS, designed to manage the entirety of logistics operations.
project_permergas_description: Fleet management and credit line system for a gas station: automated billing reports and suspension for non-payment.
project_javer_description: Backend for the CMS and blog of Javer real estate, with Next.js frontend support for component implementation and view design.
project_proximity_description: Backend for access control in industrial parks with Hikvision camera webhook integration for real-time monitoring.
project_excelencia_description: Migration of a production database from a dockerized EC2 environment to Amazon RDS, improving scalability and operational security.
project_rendilitros_description: Backend for a fuel loyalty mobile app: user registration and transaction processing for points accumulation.
project_rrhh_description: Comprehensive backend for an internal HR system: task management, vacation requests, onboarding/offboarding, and AI-powered project cost reports.
project_codisa_description: Clothing e-commerce built with Vue.js and Nuxt.js. Led the payment gateway migration from Stripe to OpenPay (BBVA) on both frontend and backend.
project_forprint_description: Complete billing and inventory control system with Node.js and GraphQL, automating manual processes and reducing sync times.
project_gmar_description: Two ride-sharing mobile apps built from scratch: a native Android app with Jetpack Compose and a cross-platform app with Flutter, both connected via GraphQL.
contact_description: I'm looking for a team where I can contribute with serverless architecture, robust backends, and end-to-end delivery. If you have a project or an open position, let's talk.
